positive: A highly stylized and visually dynamic composition featuring a stylized depiction of a celestial journey: a whimsical, glowing hot air balloon filled with geometric constellations and nebula clouds, ascending over an anthropomorphic, serene mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, twilight sky. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing gold, and violet. The style should be Neo-Art Deco meets celestial fantasy illustration, emphasizing clean lines, strong contrast, and crisp edges. The balloon must be the central, dominant subject. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, with high contrast silhouettes and limited photographic realism. Composition: centered, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, photorealistic, watermark, text, logo, artifact, grain, low quality, bad anatomy, noise, cartoonish, sketch, messy lines, extra limbs, poorly drawn, messy composition
